evals.name: docx-to-markdown
evals.prompt: I've got a Word doc at q3_report.docx in this folder — can you convert it to Markdown and save it as q3_report.md? It has a table in it I need to keep.
evals.expected_output: q3_report.md containing the heading 'Q3 Engineering Report' and a Markdown table with the SEV1/SEV2/SEV3 rows.

assertions.text: Output file q3_report.md exists and is non-empty
Markdown contains the heading text 'Q3 Engineering Report'
Markdown contains a table with the rows SEV1, SEV2, SEV3 and the MTTR values 43, 19, 7
Conversion succeeded on the first real attempt without dependency/install errors

evals.name: xlsx-to-markdown
evals.prompt: convert sales.xlsx to markdown for me, output to sales.md please
evals.expected_output: sales.md containing the Region/Revenue/Cost data as a Markdown table with EMEA, AMER, APAC rows.

assertions.text: Output file sales.md exists and is non-empty
Markdown contains the regions EMEA, AMER, and APAC
Conversion succeeded on the first real attempt without dependency/install errors

evals.name: pptx-to-markdown
evals.prompt: Need the text out of roadmap.pptx as markdown so I can drop it into a doc. Save it to roadmap.md.
evals.expected_output: roadmap.md containing the slide titles and bullet text from the presentation.

assertions.text: Output file roadmap.md exists and is non-empty
Markdown contains the bullet text (zero-trust, failover, anomaly detection)
Conversion succeeded on the first real attempt without dependency/install errors
